description_long: This is a lifelike model of a domestic cat with a slender build and a raised, upright tail. The cat's fur is predominantly orange with distinct lighter stripes, characteristic of a tabby pattern, and white accents on the paws, chest, and face. Its eyes are open and alert, with pointed ears facing forward, giving it a curious and attentive expression. The cat appears to be standing on all four legs, with its head slightly turned to one side. The surface texture mimics short fur, and the finish is matte, suggesting a soft, tactile feel. The object is solid and compact, resembling the size and proportions of a real adult cat.
description: A realistic orange tabby cat with white paws and an upright tail, standing alertly with a matte, fur-like surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat's face, white chest, and upright tail, with both front legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange tabby stripes, white paws, and the cat's head turned slightly forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, tail, and hind legs, with the tail prominently upright.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the full body profile, tabby stripes, and the cat's alert facial features.
attribute_fur_pattern: striped orange tabby with white paws and face
